hypothesis: Frozen v1.2 monolithic ExECT S3 field-family label policy on the full fixed validation split (40 records) with Qwen3.6:35b establishes the Thread D local-model anchor without changing S3 scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S3 diagnostics (nine families), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
GPT 4.1-mini frozen anchor: runs/exect_s3_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T235439Z (72.1% micro F1; comorbidity 59.8% accepted gap vs S2).
Pooled micro F1 across nine families is not comparable to S2 five-family or S1 three-family headlines.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment.
Report per-family F1; monitor investigation modality and seizure families vs GPT v1.2 anchor.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
